description: STILL-FAIL-CLOSED (issue #199): the paragraph carries TWO pending (unresolved) tracked-change revisions from two DIFFERENT authors -- multiple revision authors interleaved on the same clause text. This is one of the genuinely-ambiguous structures issue #199 reserves fail-closed for: the pipeline cannot silently decide which author's pending edit (or what composition/order of both) is operative, unlike the single-pending-revision accept-all case. Must fail closed to reason=unnormalizable_input.

paragraphs.heading: Limitation on Liability
paragraphs.text: Each party's aggregate liability under this Agreement shall not exceed $150,000.

revisions.author: counterparty
revisions.original_text: Each party's aggregate liability under this Agreement shall not exceed $150,000.
revisions.resulting_text: Each party's liability under this Agreement shall be uncapped.

revisions.author: counterparty_second_reviewer
revisions.original_text: Each party's aggregate liability under this Agreement shall not exceed $150,000.
revisions.resulting_text: Each party's aggregate liability under this Agreement shall not exceed $250,000.
